description: CompositionBlue, white, grey and red check shirt made of 100% cotton, has full sleeves with mid-sleeve buttoned flaps, front buttoned placket, two button flap chest pockets with embroidered branding above the left one, tipped collar, buttoned shoulder flaps and has a curved hemFittingComfortWash careMachine wash in warm water with like colours only, using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry under shadeWarm ironChecks that add immense style to your casual wardrobe is what spykar brings into your life.  Be the cynosure of all eyes in this stylish shirt, while the fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. The full sleeves are sure to keep the winter chill away, while you can roll them up and secure them with the mid-sleeve buttoned flaps to suit the occasion. Team this with denims or corduroys and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight: 6’1”; Chest: 38.5”; Shoulders: 18.5”
